name: Choco-Peanut Butter Squares
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large mixing bowl, stir together the flour, brown sugar, baking powder, and baking soda.
2. Add the peanut butter and butter; blend at low speed of an electric mixer until crumbly.
3. Remove 1 cup of the crumb mixture and set aside.
4. To the remaining crumbs in the bowl, add milk, vanilla, and eggs. Blend at low speed until moistened.
5. Beat for 3 minutes at medium speed.
6. Pour the batter into an ungreased 13 x 9 baking pan.
7. Sprinkle the chocolate pieces over the batter.
8. Sprinkle the reserved crumbs atop.
9. Bake in a preheated 350°F oven for 40 to 45 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
10. Remove from the oven and let cool before cutting into squares to serve.
